name: crt-tokens
title: CRT Design Tokens
description: CSS custom properties for the green LCD / retro CRT design system

name: crt-effects
title: CRT Global Effects
description: Global body scanline and phosphor column CRT overlays

name: cn
title: cn() Utility
description: Lightweight class name merge utility (no external deps)

name: crt-button
title: CRT Button
description: Retro LCD button with default / primary / danger variants

name: crt-card
title: CRT Card
description: Content card with optional admin variant and sub-components (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardSub, CardActions)

name: crt-badge
title: CRT Badge
description: Small status badge with default / published variants

name: crt-input
title: CRT Input
description: Single-line text input styled for the CRT design system

name: crt-textarea
title: CRT Textarea
description: Multi-line text input styled for the CRT design system

name: crt-label
title: CRT Label
description: Form label styled for the CRT design system

name: crt-section-header
title: CRT Section Header
description: Section title with blinking cursor prefix — public and admin variants

name: crt-tag
title: CRT Tag
description: Small inline tag — blog tag, stack chip, and admin variants
